Professional Retractor Lite 31 Hardware for Trade Show & Display Setup

The Retractor Lite 31 Hardware provides a professional, lightweight solution for your retractable banner display needs. This aluminum stand hardware is designed for easy setup at trade shows, retail locations, and business presentations.

Retractor Stand Hardware Features

  • Lightweight aluminum base construction for easy transport
  • Available in professional black or silver finish
  • Two swivel feet provide superior stability on various surfaces
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick setup and takedown
  • Banner attaches with snap rail system on top and banner tape on bottom
  • Compact design fits standard carrying cases

Retractor Lite 31 Hardware Dimensions

  • Display Size: 32" W x 84" H x 15" D when assembled
  • Product Weight: 6 lbs for easy portability
  • Compatible with standard retractable banner graphics

Note: Banner graphics are sold separately. This hardware is designed to work with our retractable banner printing services.

Retractor Stand Hardware Questions & Answers

What's included with the Retractor Lite 31 Hardware?

The hardware includes the aluminum base, shock cord pole system, snap rail for banner attachment, banner tape, and swivel feet. Setup instructions are also included. Banner graphics are sold separately.

How much does the retractor stand hardware weigh?

The complete hardware unit weighs 6 lbs, making it easy to transport to trade shows and events while still providing stable display support.

What size banners work with this hardware?

The Retractor Lite 31 Hardware is designed for banners that are 31" wide and up to 84" tall. The snap rail system accommodates standard retractable banner materials.

How long does setup take?

The shock cord pole system and snap rail attachment allow for setup in just a few minutes. No tools are required - simply extend the pole, attach your banner, and adjust the swivel feet for stability.

Can I use multiple banners with one hardware unit?

Yes, the snap rail system makes it easy to swap banner graphics quickly. You can have multiple banners printed for different events or messages and change them as needed.

Is assembly required?

Minimal assembly is required. The main components come ready to use - you simply extend the shock cord pole and attach your banner graphics. Detailed instructions are included.

What's the difference between black and silver finish?

Both finishes offer the same durability and functionality. Black provides a modern, professional appearance while silver offers a classic trade show look. Choose based on your brand preference.

How stable is the base on different floor surfaces?

The dual swivel feet adjust to accommodate uneven surfaces and provide excellent stability on carpet, tile, concrete, and other common floor types found at events and retail locations.
